255 H0100B_EXTRNL_CTHTR_CD H0100B_EXTRNL_CTHTR_CD H0100B Bladder and Bowel Appliances: External Catheter Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had an external catheter. -=Not assessed/no information

256 H0100C_OSTMY_CD H0100C_OSTMY_CD H0100C Bladder and Bowel Appliances: Ostomy Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had an ostomy (including urostomy, ileostomy, and colostomy).
